notes: Case listed as Case 01-20 in the docket (line item 21 on p. 110). The case caption is 'Complaint Deacon Dae Hee Lee, et al. vs. Korean Capital Presbytery'. The case appears only in the judicial case list and status summary. No opinion or decision text exists for this case.
